$comment: 20-photo edge-case corpus for the v2 face-gated inpaint pipeline. Companion to docs/inpaint-edge-cases.md and PR #41. Run via scripts/inpaint-edge-test.ps1 AFTER PR #41 lands.

photos.notes: Subject is back-to-camera near WWI aero engine. Face NOT visible -> no trigger expected.
Visitor at right edge, edge-cropped, no face exposed.
Eduard wearing dark sunglasses; face partially occluded. Watch for false-negative (BlazeFace dislikes full-eye occlusion).
One subject in red sunglasses + black cap, second subject bare-faced. Two adjacent person bboxes - mask UNION test.
3-quarter profile. BlazeFace is frontal-tuned; profile detection is threshold-sensitive. May fall through to COPY.
Face cropped above the lips - eyes/nose missing. Likely no detection -> COPY. If detected, INPAINT.
Adult + 2 younger faces, all front-facing. Mask must union all 3 person bboxes.
Tiny silhouettes on cliff path - well below 0.5% min-face-area floor. Threshold sanity check.
Distant tourists. One closer foreground figure may flirt with the 0.5% floor.
Two figures on path are sub-threshold.

photos.place: Gibraltar - Burma Stores Central tunnel sign
photos.notes: Eduard's silhouette/shadow on glass vitrine. No facial features. False-positive would corrupt the vitrine + sign.
Mosque shot through windshield with faint reflection of figure + driver in parked car. Borderline trigger.

Soldier in maroon beret + plate carrier + slung rifle, civilian alongside. Both faces visible. CRITICAL: rifle and tactical gear must be erased WITH the soldier - no orphaned weapon (cf. v1 Ljubljana bicycle bug).
Three mannequins in helmets behind glass with painted/cast faces. Same family as bronze-statue v1 regression.

photos.place: Trieste - chiesa di Sant'Antonio Taumaturgo (rooftop saints)
photos.notes: The exact rooftop saints v1 destroyed. v2's reason to exist is to leave these alone. HARD FAIL if any face triggers.

photos.place: Helsinki - Senate Square, Alexander II monument
photos.notes: Bronze statues at dusk + rooftop saints. Tougher lighting than #15. Monument blocklist is the safety net.

photos.place: Malaga Cathedral - chapel saints in niches
photos.notes: Polychrome saints under warm interior lighting - higher false-positive risk than bronze.
Stone face on foreground fountain + distant tourists. Both should be sub-trigger. If fountain face triggers, foreground gets a hole.
Three silhouettes against sunset - no facial features. False positive would ruin the wet-sand sunset reflection.
Two subjects shoulder-to-shoulder + iconostasis with dozens of painted icon faces. Living faces detect, painted icons must NOT. Mask union must cover both bodies without spilling into iconostasis.
